chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-432 of 2024 (Sarfraz & others Vs. SHO P.S KGM & others) DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Date of hearing and Order 15.08.2024 Mr. Muhammad Saleem Kunbhar advocate for applicants a/w applicants Mr. Kamran Bhatti advocate for respondent No.2 a/w respondent No.2 Mr. Dhani Bakhsh Mari Assistant P.G. Sindh = O R D E R Adnan-ul-Karim Memon, J. Through this Criminal Miscellaneous Application under section 561-A Cr.P.C, the applicants Muhammad Sarfraz, Muhamad Kamran and Abrar have sought annulment of Order dated 13-06-2024 passed by learned Ex-Officio Justice of Peace/Additional Sessions Judge-I, Mirpurkhas, whereby he allowed the application under section 22-A & B Cr. P.C of respondent No.02, for registration of FIR against the applicants. 2. Today, counsel for both parties after arguing the matter at some length, agreed to resolve their dispute in the terms that possession of the disputed property shall be delivered to respondent No.02 by the applicants and respondent No.02 shall not press the enforcement of the impugned Order. 3. If this is the stance of the parties, coupled with the consent of learned A.P.G, this Criminal Miscellaneous Application can be disposed of in the terms that the parties have buried their hatchet and are no longer interested in continuing the civil/criminal litigation. The proposal seems to be reasonable and acceded to. 4. In view of the above, the instant Crl. Misc. Application stands disposed of. JUDGE *Ali Sher*
